notes.title: CHAT SUMMARY — 2026-06-18 — EC-OS & Workout
notes.body:
CHAT SUMMARY — 2026-06-18 — EC-OS & Workout

EC-OS: Major fixes completed today
Supabase sync was broken (data.json was empty)

Root cause: GitHub Actions export workflow was using the anon key, which RLS now blocks after the June 17 security lockdown.
Fix: Swapped SUPABASE_KEY secret in GitHub Actions to the new Supabase sb_secret_... key (not the legacy service_role). Manually triggered the export workflow — data.json now populates correctly.

Note delete bug fixed

Root cause: delNote() was calling sbUpsertNotes() instead of sbDelete() — upsert never removes rows, so deleted notes always came back on next load.
Fix: Rewrote delNote() to call sbDelete('ec_notes', id) with a localStorage rollback on failure. Claude Code edited locally, committed and pushed via git (commit 98d501c).

Ghost notes deleted directly in Supabase Table Editor

1781723397394 — D.A. Dallas chat summary (legit note, user wanted removed)
1781723463965 — Prank ETF data dump (friend's prank during demo)

Workflow note confirmed: Deploy via git add / commit / push or Claude Code — NOT manual GitHub web UI upload. That was the old pre-git workflow.

Health: Hypoglycemia mid-workout

Threw up mid-set during upper day (after DB rows, before OHP). Mom (ex-dietitian) flagged hypoglycemia.
Pre-workout (Pump House) taken on empty stomach — likely a contributing factor.
Fix going forward: eat 30-60 min before training (carbs + protein), never take pre-workout fasted.
Completed: bench, DB rows. Missed: OHP and remaining accessories. Resume from OHP next upper session.
Underlying issue: calorie target (2,400+) not consistently hit — narrows blood sugar margin under training stress.

notes.title: EC-OS Session — June 17, 2026: Security Lockdown Complete
notes.body:
What got fixed today:

Supabase sync was broken: writes fired but nothing loaded back on startup, so data never crossed devices. Fixed — sbLoadAll() now loads from Supabase on startup, save/delete functions properly await calls, sync status indicator added to header. Verified working Mac ↔ phone.
Exposed Supabase key: confirmed it was the anon key (not service_role — lower severity than initially flagged), but discovered all 7 tables (ec_savings, ec_gym, ec_golf, ec_tennis, ec_habits, ec_config, ec_notes) had RLS policies set to "public" — meaning anyone with the key could read/write/delete everything.
Built real authentication: password-only login screen (email hidden, fixed LOGIN_EMAIL = elicrist@icloud.com under the hood) using Supabase Auth. Debugged through three real bugs: wrong content-type (form-urlencoded vs JSON), grant_type in wrong location (body vs URL query param) — both fixed and verified live.
Locked down the database: dropped all "public" RLS policies, replaced with auth.uid() IS NOT NULL policies on all 7 tables. Data now requires real login, not just the key.
Password updated from test value to permanent one.

Dev workflow notes for future sessions:

GitHub Actions auto-commits data.json every 6 hours — causes push conflicts if you don't git pull before starting work. Fix: pull first, always, before editing.
Standard deploy flow confirmed working: git pull → make changes → git add . → git commit -m "..." → git push.
Claude Code (VS Code extension) fully set up on M5 Pro MacBook, repo cloned to ~/Documents/EC-OS, confirmed working for audits, debugging, and direct file edits.

Tabled for later:

Never reviewed the actual line-by-line diff of the auth code (Eli said he's fine skipping this).
Could tighten further: block anonymous fallback entirely (mentioned by Claude Code, not yet pursued).

Preference noted: Eli wants less narration/praise on wins — quick acknowledgment, then move to next item, not a recap of what made the moment good.

notes.title: CHAT SUMMARY — 2026-06-16 — Nutrition + Creatine + EC-OS Code Updates
notes.body:
NUTRITION
Full day food log estimated:

Calories through dinner: ~2,295–2,345 (target: 2,400+, gap ~75–150 cal to close at dinner)
Protein through dinner: ~120g (target: 150–170g, gap ~30–50g — dinner needs to be protein-heavy)
Structural problem identified: lunch is carb/fat heavy (biscuit & gravy, fruit snacks, rice krispie, honey smoothie) with almost no protein anchor. Fix: add a protein source at breakfast and lunch instead of relying entirely on dinner chicken.
Eli is lactose intolerant — all recommendations dairy-free

SUPPLEMENTS

Pre-workout: Pump House (non-stim) — 120 cal, 0g protein, contains Creatine MagnaPower (Kre-Alkalyn) at 1,500mg per 2 scoops → ~1.1–1.2g actual creatine
Post-workout: Reversal — 210 cal per 2 scoops, 20g protein
Creatine decision: clinical dose is 3–5g/day. Current intake from Pump House is ~1.1g. Verdict: add ~3g plain creatine monohydrate daily (dump in post-workout smoothie, tasteless). Buy Creapure-certified brand — Thorne, Klean Athlete, or BulkSupplements. No stimulants, no buzz. Kre-Alkalyn marketing is largely unsupported vs mono.

WORKOUT — 6/16 (Lower A)

Squat: 120 lbs, 3×7 ✓ (first test, solidly in 6-8 range)
RDL: 95 lbs, 3×10 ✓
Box Step-Up: 26 lbs KB, 3×10 each (logged as 20 in EC-OS — same for DB Row)
KB Swing: 35 lbs, 3×15 ✓
Plank: 3×45 sec ✓

EC-OS CODE UPDATES DEPLOYED (index.html)
Three changes in one file upload:

Timezone fix — today() now uses toLocaleDateString('en-CA', {timeZone:'America/Denver'}) instead of toISOString(). Fixes habit date flip after 6pm MDT. Applied everywhere: habit logging, note saving, week grid, date inputs on init.
Session-based gym logging — Gym tab rebuilt. Instead of logging one set at a time (which counted each set as a "workout"), you now build a full session and save it together. Quick-load buttons (Upper A / Lower A / Upper B / Lower B) pre-populate with program weights. One save button commits the session. Dashboard workout count now uses distinct dates in gymLog, not row count — fixes the 16 workouts vs 3 days problem.
Streak counters — Dashboard gym stat shows consecutive day streak. Habits card shows 🔥 streak badge at 2+ consecutive days with at least one habit checked.

OPEN LOOPS

Buy creatine monohydrate (Thorne / Klean Athlete / BulkSupplements, Creapure certified, ~3g/day in post-workout smoothie)
Correct EC-OS gym log entries: Box Step-Up and DB Row logged as 20 reps (should be 10 each = 10/side)
Dinner tonight still unknown — needs to close ~30–50g protein gap
Calorie target (2,400+/day) remains a consistent daily challenge — structural fix needed at breakfast/lunch

notes.body:

EQUIPMENT CONFIRMED

Rack, barbell, plates (260 lbs total), adjustable DBs (max ~30 lbs), fixed DBs (5/10/15), KBs: 9/13/26/35/53 lbs (one each), rings, fan rower, box, bands, medicine balls. No jump rope confirmed.
KEY FLAGS

Curls are DB only — no 25 lb barbell. Dropped to 19 lbs today after 24 lbs form broke down
35 KB does double duty in Lower B (goblet + swings) — fine, not supersetted
Lower A squats untested — first session tomorrow, adjust if 120 feels off
Deadlift untested — 135 is conservative opener
Calorie target (2,400+/day) still flagged as a gap

EC-OS CHANGES DEPLOYED

PROGRAM object fully rewritten with correct weights on every exercise
Workout tab: all days now clickable to view any day's workout
Today highlighted with badge; selected day highlights in green
Progression check section added — tracks Bench/Squat/Deadlift/DB Row/Curl/Pull-up vs targets, shows ✓ ready when top of rep range hit 2 sessions in a row
Deployment issue resolved (index.html wasn't in repo — re-uploaded via GitHub UI)

OPEN LOOPS

First Lower A session tomorrow — log squat and RDL weights after testing
Creatine top-up decision still pending (bring labels)
Wednesday schedule timing conflict (Magda lesson) still in queue

notes.title: CHAT SUMMARY — 2026-06-14 — Fitness + EC-OS Supabase Migration
notes.body:
FITNESS

Program: 4-day Upper/Lower split. Upper A/B Mon/Thu, Lower A/B Tue/Fri.
First workout completed 6/14 (Upper A). All reps and weights hit.
Working weights: Bench 85, DB Row 30, DB OHP 20, Face Pulls band, Curl 25 (dumbbell not barbell — bar is 45 lbs). Bicep curl was logged at 35, flag this next session.
Supplements: Intra House = intra-workout sip (not pre), Reversal = post-workout 2 scoops in 24-28oz water. Already has ~2.25g Kre-Alkalyn creatine. May supplement with extra 2-3g mono.
Alarm set for 6:30am. Workout before work. Breakfast after shower: eggs, sausage, fruit.
Calorie target 2,400+/day — currently not being met.

EC-OS INFRASTRUCTURE

Supabase project live: bezcgrtihvmktxjkbfrl.supabase.co
Tables created: ec_config, ec_savings, ec_gym, ec_golf, ec_tennis, ec_habits, ec_notes
index.html updated with Supabase sync hooks on all save/delete functions
GitHub Action running every 6 hours, exports all tables to public/data.json — readable at raw.githubusercontent.com/elicrist/EC-OS/main/public/data.json
Notes tab added to EC-OS — localStorage + Supabase backed
Manual Action trigger available anytime from Actions tab
Dock PWA updated and confirmed working with live data

OPEN LOOPS

Creatine top-up decision pending (bring supplement labels next chat)
Full equipment list never transferred — came from a different chat Claude can't access
Bicep curl weight discrepancy (logged 35, prescribed 25) — address next Upper A session
Lower A weights not yet tested — first Lower day is next week

NEXT ACTIONS

Monday: Lower A first session
Trigger Action manually after adding notes so data.json updates immediately
Bring supplement container labels next chat for creatine final call
